nodes.label: Claim 1
nodes.content: Remote work saves commute time and energy.

nodes.label: Claim 2
nodes.content: Remote work improves focus by reducing office distractions.

nodes.label: Claim 3
nodes.content: Companies can save money on office space.

nodes.label: Evidence 1
nodes.content: The average commute is about 54 minutes a day.

nodes.label: Assumption 1
nodes.content: Saved commute time is redirected into productive work.

nodes.label: Counterargument 1
nodes.content: Remote workers can feel isolated and collaboration may suffer.

issues.title: Thesis needs direct support
issues.description: The thesis does not yet have direct evidence attached to it.
issues.why: The MVP scoring penalizes unsupported thesis-level claims heavily.
issues.action: Add evidence to the thesis or support a thesis claim with evidence.

issues.title: Focus claim needs evidence
issues.description: The distraction claim is asserted but not supported by evidence.
issues.why: Unsupported claims reduce support coverage and weaken the outline export.
issues.action: Add a study, example, or data point.

issues.title: Counterargument is not addressed
issues.description: The isolation concern is present, but nothing answers it yet.
issues.action: Add a response node or evidence that addresses the counterargument.

actions.label: Add evidence to the focus claim
actions.reason: This is the fastest path to improving the support score.

actions.label: Add a response to the isolation concern
Add evidence to the office cost claim
actions.reason: This reduces the number of unsupported claims before export.

summary.top_issue: Two claims and the thesis need evidence.
summary.export_warning: Export now, but 3 claims are unsupported. Want to fix the top 3 issues first?
